{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# Notation {#sec-notation}

<!-- A single reference table for symbols used throughout. Fill in as the
     macros in `_macros.qmd` settle. Keep this the source of truth. -->

| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| $\vocab$ | vocabulary (set of tokens) |
| $\dmodel$ | model / residual-stream width |
| $\vx$ | an input/token vector |
| $\mW$ | a weight matrix |
| $\params$ | model parameters |
| $\loss$ | loss |
| $p_\params(\cdot)$ | model distribution |

: Core notation {#tbl-notation}

## Conventions {.unnumbered}

<!-- Row vs. column vectors; batch/sequence/feature axis ordering; indexing
     from 0 or 1. State it once, here. -->
